headline: The Bull Case For AT&T (T) Could Change Following Its AI-Driven Fiber And Open RAN Push - Learn Why
summary: In recent weeks, AT&T has joined multiple telecom AI collaborations, advanced open RAN initiatives, and highlighted fiber expansion progress, including integrating Lumen’s Mass Markets fiber business and supporting new global network API and asset-intelligence partnerships. Together, these moves underscore AT&T’s push to pair large-scale 5G and fiber investments with AI-enabled, software-defined networks that could reshape how telecom infrastructure is built and monetized. We’ll now examine...

headline: AT&T Deepens AI And Open Network Push As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has expanded its asset intelligence solutions through a collaboration with Geoforce. The company reached a milestone and royalty agreement with H2O.ai focused on enterprise-grade AI infrastructure. AT&T became a founding member of the Open Centralized Unit Distributed Unit (OCUDU) Ecosystem Foundation and the GSMA Open Telco AI initiative. The Aduna joint venture extended standardized network APIs to international markets, advancing open telecom standards. For you as an...
